name: ccc-ai-audit
description: AI Automation Audit toolkit for CCC consulting engagements. Five skills covering the full audit lifecycle: entry routing, scoped discovery with process documentation, VALUE opportunity scoring with solution matching, professional audit report generation, and tiered commercial proposal creation. Based on the 5-Phase AI Audit Framework. Guides consultants through real-world audit engagements that span multiple sessions across days — including stakeholder interviews, process walkthroughs, and data collection between sessions.
